title: bupleurum montanum var. oblongifolium
intro: Bupleurum montanum var. oblongifolium, also known as Chinese Thorowax or Mountain Bupleurum, is a variety of the Bupleurum montanum plant, a species of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum montanum var. oblongifolium include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and supporting the immune system, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum montanum var. oblongifolium is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and can be used in teas, tinctures, and capsules.
